title: Senior Financial Analyst - Instamojo - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Instamojo - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at Instamojo are looking for an experienced Senior Financial Analyst based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Instamojo:
Instamojo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Instamojo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
